evals.prompt: Run setup-matt-pocock-skills in this repo before I start using the engineering skills.
evals.expected_output: The agent explores the repo for remotes, CLAUDE.md or AGENTS.md, context files, ADRs, docs/agents, and .scratch, then summarizes what exists and asks only the Section A issue-tracker decision before writing anything.
assertions: Uses the skill only because the user explicitly named or requested setup.
Checks the existing repo state instead of assuming GitHub, local markdown, or a docs layout.
Asks the issue-tracker decision first and waits for the answer before moving to triage labels.
Does not create or edit setup files before showing the draft and receiving confirmation.

evals.prompt: I already have a CLAUDE.md with an Agent skills section. Re-run the Matt Pocock skills setup and switch this repo to local markdown issues.
evals.expected_output: The agent inspects the existing CLAUDE.md block, walks the user through the required setup decisions, previews the replacement block and docs/agents files, then updates the existing block in place and writes local-markdown issue tracker guidance only after confirmation.
assertions: Edits CLAUDE.md rather than creating AGENTS.md when CLAUDE.md already exists.
Updates an existing Agent skills block in place without appending a duplicate.
Uses the local issue-tracker template for docs/agents/issue-tracker.md.
Preserves unrelated surrounding content in CLAUDE.md.

evals.prompt: Set up the engineering skills in a fresh repo that has no CLAUDE.md or AGENTS.md yet, and use GitLab issues.
evals.expected_output: The agent explores the repo, proposes GitLab when the remote supports it, asks the PR-request-surface follow-up only because GitLab was selected, and asks the user whether to create CLAUDE.md or AGENTS.md because neither file exists.
assertions: Does not choose CLAUDE.md or AGENTS.md on the user's behalf when neither exists.
Asks the external-PR request-surface follow-up for GitLab.
Records the selected issue tracker, triage labels, and domain-doc layout in docs/agents/*.md after confirmation.
Reports which downstream engineering skills will read the generated docs.
